content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(1, 4, 1), (0, 8, 4), (0, 5, 5), (5, 7, 10), (2, 9, 13), (3, 4, 13), (1, 2, 15), (2, 8, 16), (4, 9, 17), (4, 6, 19), (3, 7, 20), (3, 8, 20), (2, 7, 21), (4, 8, 21), (0, 9, 24), (4, 5, 25), (0, 7, 27)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 0 exactly at time 4.

After scanning each edge, we have the following information:

* Edge (0, 8, 4) has node 0 and time 4. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 5, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (5, 7, 10) has node 7 and time 10. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 9, 13) has node 2 and time 13. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 4, 13) has node 3 and time 13. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 2, 15) has node 1 and time 15. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (2, 8, 16) has node 2 and time 16. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 9, 17) has node 4 and time 17. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 6, 19) has node 6 and time 19. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (3, 7, 20) has node 3 and time 20. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (3, 8, 20) has node 8 and time 20. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 7, 21) has node 2 and time 21. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (4, 8, 21) has node 4 and time 21. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 9, 24) has node 0 and time 24. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 5, 25) has node 5 and time 25. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 7, 27) has node 0 and time 27. -> Add node 7.

The nodes matched are 8, 5, 7, 9, 4, and 7.

Answer: [8, 5, 7, 9, 4, 7]
